chapter_title.en: The Rights of a Believer on a Fellow Believer.

text: 103 - وعن أبي جعفر (ع) قال أيجئ أحدُكم إلى أخيهِ فيُدخِلُ يدَه في كيسه فيأخذُ حاجتَهُ فلا يدفعُه؟ فقلت: ما أعرف ذلك فينا، قال: فقال أبوجعفر (ع) فلا شَئ إذَن. قلت: فالهلكة إذا! قال إنَّ القَومَ لم يُعطَوا أحلامَهم بعدُ.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 103. It has been reported that Abu Ja'far (a.s) asked: Does any of you come to his brother, put his hand in his pocket and takes what he wants; and the other one does not stop him?' I (the narrator) said, 'I do not know of that (happening) amongst us.' So, Abu Ja'far (a.s) said, 'Then (you have achieved) nothing.' 'Then (we are) doomed!' I exclaimed. 'The community (of believers) have not attained maturity in their understanding yet,' he remarked.
